schema.c(3) Library Functions Manual schema.c(3)

NAME

schema.c - Schema metadata registry for config file options.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


asciichat_error_t config_schema_build_from_configs (const options_config_t **configs, size_t num_configs)
Build schema dynamically from options builder configs. const config_option_metadata_t * config_schema_get_by_toml_key (const char *toml_key)
Get option metadata by TOML key. const config_option_metadata_t ** config_schema_get_by_category (const char *category, size_t *count)
Get all option metadata for a category. const config_option_metadata_t * config_schema_get_all (size_t *count)
Get all option metadata. void config_schema_destroy (void)
Clean up dynamically allocated schema resources.

Detailed Description

Schema metadata registry for config file options.

Definition in file schema.c.

Function Documentation

asciichat_error_t config_schema_build_from_configs (const options_config_t ** configs, size_t num_configs)

Build schema dynamically from options builder configs. This function builds the config schema by merging all mode configs (server, client, mirror, etc.). It generates TOML keys, CLI flags, categories, and types from the builder's option descriptors.

Parameters

configs Array of option configs (can contain NULL entries)
num_configs Number of configs in the array

Returns

ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code on failure

Note

This should be called once during initialization before any config parsing

Definition at line 242 of file schema.c.

242                                                                                                          {
243   // Free existing dynamic schema if any
244   if (g_dynamic_schema) {
245     SAFE_FREE(g_dynamic_schema);
246     g_dynamic_schema = NULL;
247     g_dynamic_schema_count = 0;
248   }
249 
250   // Free existing string storage
251   if (g_dynamic_strings) {
252     for (size_t i = 0; i < g_dynamic_strings_count; i++) {
253       SAFE_FREE(g_dynamic_strings[i]);
254     }
255     SAFE_FREE(g_dynamic_strings);
256     g_dynamic_strings = NULL;
257     g_dynamic_strings_count = 0;
258     g_dynamic_strings_capacity = 0;
259   }
260 
261   // Count total unique descriptors (by offset) across all configs
262   // Use a simple approach: collect all descriptors, then deduplicate by offset
263   const option_descriptor_t *all_descriptors[256] = {0}; // Max expected options
264   size_t descriptor_count = 0;
265 
266   // Collect descriptors from all configs
267   for (size_t cfg_idx = 0; cfg_idx < num_configs; cfg_idx++) {
268     const options_config_t *config = configs[cfg_idx];
269     if (!config) {
270       log_debug("Config %zu is NULL, skipping", cfg_idx);
271       continue;
272     }
273 
274     if (!config->descriptors || config->num_descriptors == 0) {
275       log_debug("Config %zu has no descriptors", cfg_idx);
276       continue;
277     }
278 
279     for (size_t i = 0; i < config->num_descriptors && descriptor_count < 256; i++) {
280       const option_descriptor_t *desc = &config->descriptors[i];
281       if (!desc) {
282         log_warn("Descriptor at index %zu in config %zu is NULL", i, cfg_idx);
283         continue;
284       }
285       if (should_add_descriptor(desc, all_descriptors, descriptor_count)) {
286         all_descriptors[descriptor_count++] = desc;
287       }
288     }
289   }
290 
291   // Allocate schema array
292   g_dynamic_schema = SAFE_MALLOC(descriptor_count * sizeof(config_option_metadata_t), config_option_metadata_t *);
293   if (!g_dynamic_schema) {
294     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to allocate dynamic schema");
295   }
296 
297   // Build schema entries
298   g_dynamic_schema_count = 0;
299   char toml_key_buffer[BUFFER_SIZE_SMALL];
300   char cli_flag_buffer[256];
301   char category_buffer[64];
302 
303   for (size_t i = 0; i < descriptor_count; i++) {
304     const option_descriptor_t *desc = all_descriptors[i];
305     if (!desc || !desc->long_name || !desc->group) {
306       continue;
307     }
308 
309     config_option_metadata_t *meta = &g_dynamic_schema[g_dynamic_schema_count++];
310     // Zero-initialize the metadata struct to ensure all fields are initialized
311     memset(meta, 0, sizeof(*meta));
312 
313     // Use builder's type directly
314     meta->type = desc->type;
315 
316     // Generate category: lowercase the group name from builder
317     SAFE_STRNCPY(category_buffer, desc->group, sizeof(category_buffer) - 1);
318     category_buffer[sizeof(category_buffer) - 1] = '\0';
319     str_tolower(category_buffer);
320 
321     // Generate TOML key: "category.field_name" (category is lowercase group, field_name is long_name with
322     // dashes->underscores)
323     if (!generate_toml_key(category_buffer, desc->long_name, toml_key_buffer, sizeof(toml_key_buffer))) {
324       g_dynamic_schema_count--; // Skip this entry
325       continue;
326     }
327 
328     // Store generated strings (allocate and store)
329     meta->toml_key = store_dynamic_string(toml_key_buffer);
330     meta->category = store_dynamic_string(category_buffer);
331     if (!meta->toml_key || !meta->category) {
332       // Failed to allocate strings, skip this entry
333       g_dynamic_schema_count--;
334       continue;
335     }
336 
337     // Generate CLI flag: "--long-name"
338     if (generate_cli_flag(desc->long_name, cli_flag_buffer, sizeof(cli_flag_buffer))) {
339       meta->cli_flag = store_dynamic_string(cli_flag_buffer);
340       if (!meta->cli_flag) {
341         // Failed to allocate, but continue (cli_flag can be NULL)
342       }
343     } else {
344       meta->cli_flag = NULL;
345     }
346 
347     // Set other fields
348     meta->context = OPTION_CONTEXT_BOTH; // Most options can appear in both CLI and config
349     meta->field_offset = desc->offset;
350     meta->field_size = get_field_size(meta->type, desc->offset);
351     // Use builder's validate function directly - it receives the full options struct
352     meta->validate_fn = desc->validate;
353     // Use builder's parse function for CALLBACK types
354     meta->parse_fn = desc->parse_fn;
355     meta->description = desc->help_text;
356 
357     // Set mode_bitmask from option descriptor
358     // The descriptor should have mode_bitmask set from the registry
359     meta->mode_bitmask = desc->mode_bitmask;
360 
361     // Copy mode_default_getter function pointer
362     meta->mode_default_getter = desc->mode_default_getter;
363 
364     // Copy constraints from descriptor's metadata
365     // For integer types, copy numeric_range to int_range (always copy, even if min is 0)
366     memset(&meta->constraints, 0, sizeof(meta->constraints));
367     // Always copy numeric_range if descriptor has it (check max or min)
368     if (desc && desc->metadata.numeric_range.max > 0) {
369       meta->constraints.int_range.min = desc->metadata.numeric_range.min;
370       meta->constraints.int_range.max = desc->metadata.numeric_range.max;
371     }
372   }
373 
374   g_schema_built = true;
375   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
376 }




References ASCIICHAT_OK, BUFFER_SIZE_SMALL,
    config_option_metadata_t::category,
    config_option_metadata_t::cli_flag,
    config_option_metadata_t::constraints,
    config_option_metadata_t::context,
    config_option_metadata_t::description,
    options_config_t::descriptors, ERROR_MEMORY,
    config_option_metadata_t::field_offset,
    config_option_metadata_t::field_size,
    option_descriptor_t::group, option_descriptor_t::help_text,
    config_option_metadata_t::int_range, log_debug,
    log_warn, option_descriptor_t::long_name,
    config_option_metadata_t::max, option_metadata_t::max,
    option_descriptor_t::metadata, config_option_metadata_t::min,
    option_metadata_t::min,
    config_option_metadata_t::mode_bitmask,
    option_descriptor_t::mode_bitmask,
    config_option_metadata_t::mode_default_getter,
    option_descriptor_t::mode_default_getter,
    options_config_t::num_descriptors,
    option_metadata_t::numeric_range, option_descriptor_t::offset,
    OPTION_CONTEXT_BOTH, config_option_metadata_t::parse_fn,
    option_descriptor_t::parse_fn, SAFE_FREE, SAFE_MALLOC,
    SAFE_STRNCPY, SET_ERRNO,
    config_option_metadata_t::toml_key,
    config_option_metadata_t::type, option_descriptor_t::type,
    option_descriptor_t::validate, and
    config_option_metadata_t::validate_fn.


Referenced by action_create_config(), and
    options_init().






void
  config_schema_destroy (void )


Clean up dynamically allocated schema resources. Frees all memory
    allocated by config_schema_build_from_configs(), including the
    dynamic schema array and all associated strings. Safe to call multiple times
    or if schema was never built.




Note


This should be called during shutdown to prevent memory
  leaks


Definition at line 456 of file schema.c.


456                                  {
457   if (!g_schema_built) {
458     return; // Nothing to clean up
459   }
460 
461   // Free all dynamically allocated strings (toml_key, cli_flag, category)
462   if (g_dynamic_strings) {
463     for (size_t i = 0; i < g_dynamic_strings_count; i++) {
464       SAFE_FREE(g_dynamic_strings[i]);
465     }
466     SAFE_FREE(g_dynamic_strings);
467     g_dynamic_strings = NULL;
468     g_dynamic_strings_count = 0;
469     g_dynamic_strings_capacity = 0;
470   }
471 
472   // Free the schema array itself
473   if (g_dynamic_schema) {
474     SAFE_FREE(g_dynamic_schema);
475     g_dynamic_schema = NULL;
476     g_dynamic_schema_count = 0;
477   }
478 
479   g_schema_built = false;
480 }






References SAFE_FREE.


Referenced by options_cleanup_schema(), and
    options_state_destroy().






const config_option_metadata_t * config_schema_get_all
  (size_t * count)


Get all option metadata.


Parameters


count Output: total number of options


Returns


Array of all metadata (NULL-terminated)


Definition at line 436 of file schema.c.


436                                                                      {
437   // Schema must be built before use
438   if (!g_schema_built || !g_dynamic_schema) {
439     if (count) {
440       *count = 0;
441     }
442     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_STATE, "Schema not built");
443     return NULL;
444   }
445 
446   if (count) {
447     *count = g_dynamic_schema_count;
448   }
449   return g_dynamic_schema;
450 }






References ERROR_INVALID_STATE, and SET_ERRNO.


Referenced by config_create_default().






const config_option_metadata_t **
  config_schema_get_by_category (const char * category, size_t * count)


Get all option metadata for a category.


Parameters


category Category name (e.g., "network")


count Output: number of options in category


Returns


Array of metadata pointers (NULL-terminated)


Definition at line 403 of file schema.c.


403                                                                                                     {
404   static const config_option_metadata_t *results[64]; // Max options per category
405   size_t result_count = 0;
406 
407   if (!category) {
408     if (count) {
409       *count = 0;
410     }
411     return NULL;
412   }
413 
414   // Schema must be built before use
415   if (!g_schema_built || !g_dynamic_schema) {
416     if (count) {
417       *count = 0;
418     }
419     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_STATE, "Schema not built");
420     return NULL;
421   }
422 
423   for (size_t i = 0; i < g_dynamic_schema_count && result_count < 64; i++) {
424     if (g_dynamic_schema[i].category && strcmp(g_dynamic_schema[i].category, category) == 0) {
425       results[result_count++] = &g_dynamic_schema[i];
426     }
427   }
428 
429   if (count) {
430     *count = result_count;
431   }
432 
433   return (result_count > 0) ? results : NULL;
434 }






References ERROR_INVALID_STATE, and SET_ERRNO.


Referenced by config_create_default().






const config_option_metadata_t *
  config_schema_get_by_toml_key (const char * toml_key)


Get option metadata by TOML key.


Parameters


toml_key TOML key path (e.g.,
  "network.port")


Returns


Pointer to metadata or NULL if not found


Definition at line 382 of file schema.c.


382                                                                                     {
383   if (!toml_key) {
384     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid arguments for config_schema_get_by_toml_key");
385     return NULL;
386   }
387 
388   // Schema must be built before use
389   if (!g_schema_built || !g_dynamic_schema) {
390     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_STATE, "Schema not built");
391     return NULL;
392   }
393 
394   for (size_t i = 0; i < g_dynamic_schema_count; i++) {
395     if (g_dynamic_schema[i].toml_key && strcmp(g_dynamic_schema[i].toml_key, toml_key) == 0) {
396       return &g_dynamic_schema[i];
397     }
398   }
399 
400   return NULL;
401 }
